stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
Out of the aerofoil designs above, which type of aeroplane would be most likely to use aerofoil 1?

options.a: Aeroplanes that fly at subsonic speeds which require a high MCRIT, in order to reduce the effects of shockwaves.
options.b: Training aeroplanes that should possess good low-speed handling and stall characteristics.
options.c: Slow and medium speed aeroplanes which require predictable handling across a wide speed range.
options.d: High-speed subsonic aeroplanes which require a high MCRIT, while preserving good low-speed handling qualities.
